$readme: SYNTHETIC tax profile (issue #39 golden-snapshot fixture) — the LOW-standard-deduction variant.
Schema-valid per assets/tax/tax-profile.schema.json; carries no real names, institutions, or amounts.
It overrides ONLY standardDeductionByYear (single/2025 = 15000); every rate, bracket, and quarterly due date falls back to the bundled US defaults (assets/tax/us-tax-lines.json).
Paired with tax-profile-high-deduction.json (the two differ ONLY in that deduction — the two prove the itemize-vs-standard verdict is driven by the config value, never a hardcoded constant (M2-2).
With the fixture's fixed 22000 itemized total, 22000 > 15000 so the verdict is 'itemize'.
